label: 581_designate facility_service located_facility united_states postal
label_human: US postal service post office building designations
description: Legislation aimed at renaming usps facilities across the country, reflecting local heroes and community leaders. Each bill passed through relevant committees, highlighting regional pride and recognition of postal workers.
